description:
This Genie space supports analysis across eMoney adoption, trading activity, card usage, and Open Banking deposits, with customer attributes always reflecting their state at the time of the activity.

Scope Overview

Trading – LC/TP Positions
Analyze number of positions and total amount by CID and date, including club level, country, asset type, base currency, CFD/non-CFD indication, open/close event, account type, and whether the position was opened from LC or TP.

Open Banking Deposits
Track deposit attempts by CID, provider (Volt/Tink), date, and status (success/failed).

Card Transactions & Status
Analyze card transactions by type, currency, and amount, as well as card order, activation, and expiration dates.

Customer Lifecycle in eMoney
Includes eMoney account creation date, FMI, FMO, and first five actions in the account.

Additional attributes available across datasets: country, club, regulation, region, verification level, and account type.

👉 Please always include a clear timeframe (date, month, or range) when asking questions — results are time-dependent.
title: eMoney Adoption & Trading
